label: Transparent wisteria raceme motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Wisteria transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete wisteria raceme motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A pergola garden wisteria raceme with cascading lilac-purple blossoms, subtle violet shadows, vine-brown stems, and fresh leaf-green foliage. Crisp botanical edges, layered hanging flower structure, no cast shadow.
Composition/framing: centered complete hanging raceme cutout with generous padding, blossoms, leaves, and vine structure visible without cropping.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ffff background for removal, uniform color only, no shadow, gradient, texture, reflection, floor plane, watermark, or text.
Constraints: no grapes, no lilac shrub, no lavender sprig, no trellis background, no vase, no hand, no props, no landscape.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Wisteria light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Wisteria, derived from the visible wisteria raceme cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished flowing navigation-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Wisteria, Wisteria Raceme, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Extract lilac-purple cascading blooms, vine-brown structure, leaf-green accents, pergola mist surfaces, and soft lavender depth for navigation-heavy dashboards, menus, documentation, and multi-panel workspaces.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, navigation groups, sidebar, command palette, tables, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, borders, shadows, and token swatches.
Constraints: no generic purple gradient UI, no unrelated neon colors, no grapes, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Wisteria.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Wisteria dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn board for Morphous Wisteria that feels like the light board translated to dark mode.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished professional design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Wisteria, Wisteria Raceme, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Preserve lilac navigation states, lavender focus rings, vine-brown dark surfaces, leaf-green success states, petal-air foregrounds, and flowing menu structure for navigation-heavy product interfaces.
Constraints: no neon palette, no generic black UI, no unrelated colors, no grapes, no tiny text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Wisteria.
